name: Fr. Elias Landry
subtitle: the priest at the roadside chapel · fifty years

ultimate_ability.label: The Bell Across The Field
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. Ring the chapel bell in a way the cane field carries: every visitor within two spaces of the bell_pull advances one step, INDECISION loses two, and any 'the_one_who_stays_outside' visitor is compelled to enter the chapel next turn.

notes: Fr. Elias's hand for the Lovers arcana at roadside_chapel (the sanctuary_on_cursed_ground scenario). Kept as tbd_lovers · the primary Lovers hand is Mackenzie at the drip house; Fr. Elias is the alt-hand for the chapel scenario. INDECISION is the second stat.
